raw: Each Pass allows admission for 2 adults at $10 each and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition). Children 6 and under are free. The MFA encourages everyone to reserve tickets online in advance at mfa.org/tickets , although you will be able to use the code onsite to reserve same day tickets (patrons must present library email containing the code). Pass does not allow for discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures/seminars, or courses. This pass is not a physical pass. Reserve the pass, and you will receive an email with a unique promo code within 48 hours. Enter the code to purchase discounted tickets on the MFA website. * Funded by the Friends of the WPL

source_phrases.max_adults: 2 adults at $10 each and up to 4 children
source_phrases.max_children: 2 adults at $10 each and up to 4 children
